title: Weekly Market Update: Stocks Gain 0.9% as Energy Rises and Basic Materials Fall
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The Morningstar US Market Index rose 0.9%, with energy up 3.42% and basic materials down 1.98%. Large-cap stocks gained 1.01%, mid-cap stocks rose 0.75%, and sm
excerpt: The Morningstar US Market Index rose 0.9%, with energy up 3.42% and basic materials down 1.98%. Large-cap stocks gained 1.01%, mid-cap stocks rose 0.75%, and small-cap stocks increased 0.03%. Technology fell 2.18% for the week.

content.introduction: The Morningstar US Market Index rose 0.9%, with energy up 3.42% and basic materials down 1.98%. Large-cap stocks gained 1.01%, mid-cap stocks rose 0.75%, and small-cap stocks increased 0.03%. Technology fell 2.18% for the week.
body: The Morningstar US Market Index fell 2.18%. The best-performing sectors were energy, up 1.32%, and technology, down 0.44%.
